summary: Events are unique encounters that present the player with a scenario and asks them to make a choice on how they wish to handle that scenario. Events are only encountered in . Each  has a set of events that can only occur in that Act, but there are also events which can occur in multiple Acts. The player must choose one of the available options to be able to proceed to the next floor. If one of the standard options is unavailable for some reason, it will be greyed out. If one of the options is lethal (i.e. costs more HP than the player currently has) the option is still available but presented with a red outline. This allows for triggering e.g. .
